sectionTitle: Two Ways to Engage. One Clear Difference.
sectionSubtitle: Every engagement starts with a Blueprint — the architecture, templates, and implementation guide your team needs. What happens next is up to you.

blueprint.name: Blueprint
blueprint.description: Architecture, templates, and implementation guide. Your team builds it.

buildPartnership.name: Build Partnership
buildPartnership.description: Everything in Blueprint, plus weekly syncs, async access, training, and post-implementation validation.

rows.blueprintText: Teams with engineering capacity who need the plan
rows.buildText: Teams who want senior guidance during implementation

sovereigntyNote: For sovereignty engagements specifically, Build Partnership adds: real-time guidance through migration execution, validation at each migration phase, hands-on troubleshooting during critical migration windows, post-migration hardening review and security validation, and training on the new infrastructure for your operations team.
